    "No try-step verification (SEQ) performed during Lockout/Tagout sequence"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Verify zero energy state using a physical try-step (attempting to start the equipment using local controls)",
    "Confirm all energy isolation devices are properly locked and tagged before resuming work"

  "rationale": "Failing to perform a try-step verification (attempting to restart the machine after isolation) is a critical safety violation under LOTO procedures. Without verifying that isolation was successful, the technician is at immediate risk of unexpected energization or release of stored energy.",
